monday.com is a customizable AI work platform for project management, CRM, development, and service operations [1].

Developer access is managed through free developer accounts, which provide specialized testing environments with elevated feature access and higher limits [2][3]. Developers can request capacity reviews via the platform’s support process [3].

Authentication methods include OAuth 2.1 for user-authorized integrations and personal or app-specific API tokens for server-to-server workflows [1][4]. The platform’s API is primarily GraphQL-based [5][1]. Webhooks are available for triggering real-time events [5][1].

The platform offers two first-party Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers: the Platform MCP (for interacting with boards, items, and users) and the Apps MCP (for managing app lifecycles and deployments) [6][1].

Example Platform MCP configuration:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "monday-mcp": {
      "url": "https://mcp.monday.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

Direct GraphQL API example:
```shell
curl -X POST https://api.monday.com/v2 \
  -H "Authorization: <your_token>" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "API-Version: 2026-07" \
  -d '{"query": "{ boards (limit: 5) { id name } }"}'
```

Official documentation is located at developer.monday.com [5].
